professionalSummary: Full Stack Developer with hands-on experience building and deploying production-ready web and mobile applications for real clients. Comfortable communicating with clients to brainstorm and shape a clear build plan and design system, then translating requirements into clean, maintainable code while managing the complete application lifecycle from concept to development to deployment. Additionally leverage AI tools and APIs to build smarter features, accelerate development, and improve code quality.

description: Developed and maintained client-facing web applications using Wix Velo, JavaScript, and custom backend logic in a production environment.
Built and customized dynamic features such as product pages, search, calculators, and form-based workflows.
Integrated third-party APIs, authentication, and interactive functionality based on project requirements.
Collaborated directly with clients to gather requirements and deliver scalable, maintainable solutions.
Improved application stability and maintainability through modular code, debugging, and performance optimization.
Worked on production web applications, supporting content integration, configuration, and customization using templates and GUI-based tools.
Made minor HTML and JavaScript updates and occasionally modified existing React.js components.
Customized application behavior and content through JSON configuration files.
Collaborated with team members using task tracking and timelines to meet delivery deadlines while following professional reporting standards.

projects.title: DotBox - A Dots and Boxes Game
projects.description: Interactive browser-based game with animations and complete game logic, deployed as both a web application and Android app.

projects.title: Ozzy School - School Management & Learning Platform
projects.description: Custom authentication system with email/password login, OTP-based password reset, and session-based access control. Developed a full-stack website including landing, about, and other static pages, with role-based content delivery implemented through a custom authentication flow and backend logic.

projects.title: City to City Asia Pacific - Annual Report 2025
projects.description: Built a static, cinematic single-page annual report site with scroll-driven choreography, framed editorial photography, interactive financial charts, and a multi-section content flow (hub cities, metrics, programs, and a regional calendar) driven by typed, structured content. Used AI coding assistance during development; all work was reviewed, integrated, and validated before release.

projects.title: Typeify - Typing Speed Test
projects.description: Interactive typing speed test tool with real-time performance metrics and custom app development and integration.

projects.title: Hagah
projects.description: Maintained and enhanced a meditation app with free and premium audio streaming, improving stability, UI/UX, authentication, and implementing HLS-based audio delivery, while actively contributing to ongoing development of the app, admin panel, and backend services.

projects.title: Pastors University
projects.description: Built and maintained the learner-facing web app and related admin tooling for a pastoral leadership training platform, including course access, payments, multilingual content, and media workflows integrated with backend APIs. Used AI coding assistance during development; all work was reviewed, integrated, and validated before release.

projects.title: Go Make Disciples (CPI)
projects.description: Built and maintained a faith-based discipleship streaming and learning platform spanning mobile, web, and admin applications, including HLS-based video delivery, course access, subscription billing, an integrated book store with cart and Stripe checkout, multilingual content, and AWS-powered media processing integrated with backend APIs. Used AI coding assistance during development; all work was reviewed, integrated, and validated before release.

projects.title: Claires
projects.description: Maintained and enhanced the Claire’s website built on Wix Studio, implementing provided designs and functionality for the store and ear-piercing sections, developing a user portal, and integrating external APIs to support site features.

projects.title: The Mindset IQ
projects.description: Worked on The Mindset IQ, a web platform offering science-backed mindset and culture-fit assessments to support data-driven hiring and talent evaluation.
